ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user account (e.g., Verified, Unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., Slots, Bingo, Crash) */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "minimum_wager" TEXT /* Minimum wager allowed for the game */,
  "maximum_wager" TEXT /* Maximum wager allowed for the game */,
  "payout_structure" TEXT /* Payout structure of the game */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "bet_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "payout_amount" TEXT /* Payout amount for the bet */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit earned by the user from the bet */,
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "fraud_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate potential fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the payout */,
  "payout_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payout */,
  "payout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payout was processed */,
  "payout_method" TEXT /* Method of payout (e.g., Bank Transfer, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payout (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit record */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the profit */,
  "profit_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the profit */,
  "profit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profit was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the session was started (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device ID of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Active, Ended, Suspended) */,
  "fraud_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate potential fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Bank Transfer, PayPal, Credit Card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment method (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_payment_methods" (
  "user_payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number for the payment method */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Account name for the payment method */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user payment method (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_payment_method_id")
)
